title: Deep Underground (Mining Dimension)
description: Adds a 256-block tall deepslate cave dimension
body:
## Overview
Deep Underground adds a simple 256-block tall mining dimension. It has three biomes: **Deep Cave**, **Deep Dripstone Cave** and **Frozen Cave**. The dimension has boosted ore generation rates, boosted mob spawn rates and has three unique stone types: **Black Granite**, **Grimslate**, and **Schist**.

To create the portal, craft at least 10 **framed polished blackstone** blocks, place them in a Nether portal shape and light it with a lava bucket.

![A screenshot of the Deep Underground portal, in the Frozen Cave biome that only exists in the new dimension.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b23ca6367fb08dca6d813c813fe95c511b23745_0.webp)

The dimension is very dark, and coal doesn't generate. However, additional ores and structures can easily be added with external datapacks.

When mining deeper down into the dimension, **Viridium** and **Cerulium** can be found, which can be crafted into armor and tools. Cerulium can also be used to make **Depthbound Steel** which is obtained by leaving an **Inert Depthbound Block** below Y=24 in the dimension. After 1.1.0, **Cyclite** (a furnace fuel) can rarely generate as an ore, or be found in rare geodes.

## Compatibility
The mod has biome icons for compatibility with EMI Ores and Continuity support for the framed polished blackstone block. A future update will add proper biome tags.

## Can I Use This in a Modpack?
Yes! I actually created this mod for use in a modpack after discovering there wasn't already a similar mod on this version.
